use aiken/collection/list
use aiken/fuzz
use aiken/primitive/bytearray
use cardano/fuzz as cfuzz
use cardano/transaction.{OutputReference, Transaction}
pub type QueueNode {
  position_id: ByteArray,
  health_factor: Int,
  collateral: Int,
  debt: Int,
  next_key: Option<ByteArray>,
}
